roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PROB TRANSFER TO SAN MATEO COUNTY SENT
PD'S MOT TO CONTINUE FILED
FELONY GUILTY PLEA TX FILED
/CAL:APD 1203,9PC TRANSFER TO SAN MATEO COUNTY/DAWT/MO GRTD/CTORD:PROBATION BE TRANSFERRED FROM SF COUNTY TO SAN MATEO COUNTY OVER PEOPLE'S OBJECTION/X:ORDER SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1Y/CTW:178/X:SENTENCE MAY BE SERVED IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM,/WS/RX/11590/DTC/LFNEW/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAY A DRUG PROGRAM FEE BASE FINE OF $150 PLUS $420 IN PENALTIES AND ASSESSMENTS FOR A TOTAL OF $570 PURSUANT TO HS 11372,7,/X:DEFENDANT SHALL PAYA BASE FINE OF $500 PLUS $1,500 IN ASSESSMENTS  FOR A FINE AMOUNT OF $2,000,/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE40/ICNA/SA2:126 HYDE ST, S,F,, CA//SA2:INTERSECTION MCALLISTER & CHARLES BRENHOM ST,, S,F,, CA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL:MOT RELEASE TO PROGRAM/DEF: IS RELEASED ON THE CONDITION THAT HE REPORTS TO ADULT PROBATION ASAP AND REPORT TO THE SALVATION ARMY HARBOR HOUSE LOCATED AT 469 9TH STREET IN SF ASAP/X: THIS IS A RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM/DEF: IS TO REMAIN IN THIS PROGRAM DURING THE TENURE OF HIS SENTENCE/X: FAILURE TODO SO  DEFENDANT FACES A ONE YEAR HAMMER AT  THE TIME OF SENTENCING/X: SENTENCING DATE OF 04-25-11 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL: PRELIM/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFTADV RTS:   1/SA2: 126 HYDE ST AND THE INTERSECTION OF MCALLISTER AND CHARLES BRENHOM ST/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 04-25-11/
/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:SENTENCING & PD MOTION TO CONTINUE/MO GRTD/TWS/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/CONTD PRELIM HRG, /CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG/STWPX/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/X:02-01-11 CONFIRMED,/05    CPRELIM HRG,/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
/CAL:FINAL SET OR DISPO/STWPX/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG/STWPX/CONTD:FINAL SET OR DISPO/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/STWPX/CONTD PRELIM HRG/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
/CAL:PRELIM HRG/STWPX/CONTD:TO SET OR DISPO/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:   PRELIM HEARING/DOP    /
/CAL:TO SET/STWPX/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/STWPX/987,2/BAIL:35,000/CONTD:TO SET/DOP/
